MoodLog.title: MoodLog
MoodLog.description: Historical record of the user's emotional state, scanned via facial biomarkers or manually selected.

emotion.description: The normalized emotion name (e.g. Happy, Serene, Anxious, Neutral).

score.description: Numerical score corresponding to resilience/calmness index (0 to 5).

tip.description: Somatic tip or coping recommendation suggested by the app.

isCameraDetected.description: Boolean flag tracking if detected via webcam or selected manually.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Individual chat logs containing user requests and empathetic AI doctor triages.

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of the chat entry.

/mood_logs/{logId}.description: Collection storing the historical sequence of mood assessments.

/chats/{chatId}.description: Collection storing full persistent conversational history of diagnostic inquiries.
